Environmental Protection.summary: Consistently opposes federal environmental regulations and supports fossil fuel development.

voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Consistently opposes abortion rights and supports restrictive legislation.
